title: Leane JD
description: putting together a JD for Leane, our marketing girl. we recently revised her role and below are her responsibilities we’d like her to take. We now need to update her JD. Context:Job Description: Brand & Content LeadAs Hampr continues to connect businesses with the best hospitality suppliers across Australia and New Zealand, the Brand & Content Lead plays a critical role in bridging the gap between our brand and our community. This role has evolved from pure content creation into a ‘jack-of-all-trades’ marketing position, responsible for driving growth, maintaining brand integrity, and executing a multi-channel marketing strategy.Role PurposeThe Brand & Content Lead is responsible for driving and executing Hampr’s marketing strategy to improve overall brand awareness and generate high-quality inbound leads. You will oversee the end-to-end marketing ecosystem, from high-level strategy and stakeholder collaboration to hands-on content production and performance reporting.Roles & responsiblities:Online/Digital Marketing: Website Marketing- landing page design and copyContent Marketing- LInkedin Newsletter- e-book designs- photography- infographics- blogs- filmingSocial Media Marketing- Linkedin- InstagramEmail Marketing- EDMs- CampaignsSales Enablement- Landing PagesTraditional/Offline Marketing:Event marketing- internal activation campaigns (active customers)- internal activation campaigns (New customers)- external activations events- thought leadership/event speaker content creationInternal Admin/BAU:Occasion calendar- maintain ops portal occasionsTeam collateral requestsTownhall ReportingBrand design & Management- brand guidelines- collateral templates- Merchandise
